info.name: Custom Background
info.description: Custom Background from the Dungeon Master’s Guide 2024
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Ability Scores: Choose Any 3 Ability Scores
Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) A package of equipment worth 50 GP or less (cannot include martial weapons or armor); or (B) 50 GP

description.p: A character's background represents what the character did prior to becoming an adventurer. Creating a unique background or customizing an existing one from the Player's Handbook can reflect the particular theme of your campaign or elements of your world.

setters.set: Any 3 Ability Scores, 1 Origin Feat, 2 Skills, and 1 Tool Proficiency
